path.style: fill: none; stroke-width: 10px; stroke: rgb(48, 48, 48); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round;

line.style: paint-order: fill; fill: rgb(186, 218, 85); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 20px; stroke: rgb(255, 255, 255);
stroke: rgb(48, 48, 48); paint-order: fill; fill: rgb(186, 218, 85); stroke-linecap: round; stroke-width: 15px;
